iti86:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti86:2.1: “Monks, with reference to a monk who practices the Dhamma in accordance with the Dhamma,
iti86:2.2:
it is this way of according with the Dhamma that he should be
described as practicing the Dhamma in accordance with the Dhamma.
When speaking, he speaks Dhamma and not non-Dhamma.
When thinking, he thinks about Dhamma and not about non-Dhamma.
Avoiding both these things, he stays equanimous, mindful, alert.”
iti86:3.1: Dhamma his dwelling, Dhamma his delight,
iti86:3.4: doesn’t fall away from true Dhamma.
